inputs.label: Solute Volume
inputs.businessContext: Volume of the solute (substance being dissolved).

inputs.label: Solution Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of the solution (solute + solvent).

inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature at which volumes are measured. Not used in calculation; ensure volumes are at same temperature.

inputs.label: Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Ambient pressure. Not used for incompressible liquids.
